title: Euh Nan [16x]
description: A purple themed 1.8.9 pvp default edit
body:
Euh nan is a purple texture pack made for 1.8.9 pvp, it is more detailed than previous packs i've made but still ended up feeling clean.

It is mainly made for bedwars but can be used in other gamemodes like skywars and boxing for exemple

Here are some ingame screenshots to show the pack in games :)

![Euh Nan prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30de6c585caf5f2653569692a534704068bd26e.jpeg)

![Euh Nan prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001ee32f13a5600e5093181b0f7f23f48dd26801.jpeg)

![Euh Nan prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2de577326480aaed7fd72a498ceb2e2d382a8ad8.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
